title: Rent Payment Assistance * Domestic Violence Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Housing & Shelter > Rent Payment Assistance * Domestic Violence Issues 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter AIDS/HIV Disaster/Emergency Issues Domestic Violence Issues Domestic Violence Issues * African American Community Domestic Violence Issues * LGBTQ2+ Individuals Families with Children Hispanic/Latino Community Homeless Veterans Homelessness Issues LGBTQ2+ Individuals Medicaid Recipients Mental Health Issues Older Adults Pregnant Individuals Sexual Assault Issues Slavic Community Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Veterans Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF SABLE HOUSE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers case management, safety planning, information and referral, advocacy, support groups, community outreach, and education related to domestic and sexual violence. Support groups are available both to the public and to residents of the confidential shelter facility. Also provides rental and housing assistance services. 314 SE Oak Street Dallas, OR 97338 Eligibility: Survivors of domestic or sexual violence and their children Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 623-6703 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SABLE HOUSE SABLE HOUSE
